data.title: Strategy for skogix/src/ external project submodules
data.description:
**Context:** skogix/src/ contains 15+ forked/external project submodules that need architectural decision on location and purpose.

**Current submodules:**

* array-filter, array-map, claude-code-infrastructure-showcase, claude-code-templates
* claudecodeui, config, crud-\* (delete/get/has/set)
* jq-transforms, lore, mcp, pick-fields
* string-split, supabase, supabase-paytowin, superpowers
* superpowers-developing-for-claude-code, superpowers-marketplace
* tasks, the-elements-of-style

**Decision needed:**

* Should external projects live in skogix/src/ or separate location?
* Which are active development vs archived experiments?
* Integration with parent skogai structure?
* Build/test strategy for these submodules?

**Related:** Part of skogix folder integration (#skogix-integration)
